data.content: Remove unecessary / redundant files from the repo, also use `fallow` for help in refactoring

I’ll audit the repository for likely redundant files first, then run `fallow` with useful output options to identify dead code and safe cleanup targets before deleting anything. I’m starting by gathering current git status and locating generated/temp/docs duplicates so we can remove only low-risk files.I’m collecting a quick baseline of changed files and candidate clutter so we can avoid touching important tracked work while identifying safe deletion targets.

toolRequests.name: run_in_terminal
toolRequests.arguments: {"command":"git status --short","explanation":"Check current working tree changes before cleanup.","goal":"Establish safe baseline","mode":"sync"}

toolRequests.name: run_in_terminal
toolRequests.arguments: {"command":"Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name,Mode,Length","explanation":"List root entries to spot obvious generated/temp files.","goal":"Inventory repo root","mode":"sync"}

toolRequests.name: run_in_terminal
toolRequests.arguments: {"command":"rg --files -g \"*.log\" -g \"*.tmp\" -g \"*.bak\" -g \"*.old\" -g \"*.orig\"","explanation":"Find common temporary or backup files.","goal":"Identify cleanup candidates","mode":"sync"}

arguments.explanation: Check current working tree changes before cleanup.
List root entries to spot obvious generated/temp files.
Find common temporary or backup files.

data.content: I found a key issue: root-level `fallow` treats the Next app as disconnected and reports many false “unused-file” hits, so I’m re-running it with `--root web` for reliable, project-scoped results before refactoring or deleting code.

toolRequests.arguments: {"command":"fallow --root web dead-code --format compact","explanation":"Run dead-code analysis scoped to the Next.js app for accurate entrypoint detection.","goal":"Get trustworthy unused code results","mode":"sync"}

toolRequests.name: run_in_terminal
toolRequests.arguments: {"command":"fallow --root web dupes --format compact","explanation":"Run duplication analysis scoped to web app for actionable refactors.","goal":"Get trustworthy duplication hotspots","mode":"sync"}

toolRequests.name: run_in_terminal
toolRequests.arguments: {"command":"Get-Content package.json","explanation":"Inspect root package.json to judge if it is temporary/redundant.","goal":"Assess root JS metadata necessity","mode":"sync"}

Run duplication analysis scoped to web app for actionable refactors.
Inspect root package.json to judge if it is temporary/redundant.

data.content:
Completed. I removed redundant files and used fallow-guided refactoring, then validated no new errors in edited frontend files.

What I cleaned

1. Removed redundant tracked artifact files
- agent_skills.txt
- context_window.txt
- init_out.txt
- use_worktrees.txt
- uvicorn.log

2. Removed fallow-confirmed unused UI files
- web/src/components/ui/dropdown-menu.tsx
- web/src/components/ui/textarea.tsx

3. Refactored remaining dead code findings
- Removed stale import from [web/src/app/globals.css](web/src/app/globals.css)
- Pruned unused avatar exports/components in [web/src/components/ui/avatar.tsx](web/src/components/ui/avatar.tsx)
- Removed unused export in [web/src/components/ui/button.tsx](web/src/components/ui/button.tsx)
- Removed unused CardAction component/export in [web/src/components/ui/card.tsx](web/src/components/ui/card.tsx)
- Removed unused dependency from [web/package.json](web/package.json) and updated [web/package-lock.json](web/package-lock.json)

Validation performed

1. fallow runs
- Root-level fallow had false positives for Next routes.
- Scoped run with --root web was used for reliable results.
- Final dead-code compact output returned clean (no remaining dead-file/dead-export findings from that pass).

2. Type diagnostics
- No errors in:
  - [web/src/app/globals.css](web/src/app/globals.css)
  - [web/src/components/ui/avatar.tsx](web/src/components/ui/avatar.tsx)
  - [web/src/components/ui/button.tsx](web/src/components/ui/button.tsx)
  - [web/src/components/ui/card.tsx](web/src/components/ui/card.tsx)

3. Repo graph refresh
- Ran graphify update . successfully.

Notes

- I did not touch unrelated modified/untracked work already in your tree.
- npm reported 2 moderate vulnerabilities after dependency update (from audit output), not auto-fixed.

Natural next steps

1. Want me to run fallow dupes with --root web and do a second pass to extract shared blocks between map/files pages?
2. Want me to also remove currently untracked root temp files if they are not needed (package.json, package-lock.json, pytest.ini)?
